title: Sherlock Holmes: Crimes and Punishments
notes: Plays, sounds and high graphic works
Seems to run perfectly.  Everything seems to work great.
title: Sherlock Holmes: Crimes and Punishments

notes: On a first two or three tries audio was kind of broken, voice could be heard normally, but in the background (actually sometimes louder than actual voice) there was very annoying noise and distorted audio. Really unplayable because of that. Also when quitting the game, it was crashing. But on 4th try it started working just fine, without any changes. So maybe it was something else on my computer. Graphics looks perfect. Keyboard doesn't work in menus (but I am not sure if it works in Windows either). Mouse input looks to be working ok, but has a bit low acceleration by default.
